title: Section 18
content: No act or proceeding of 1[the General Council, the Board or any of the committees of the Corporation] shall be invalid by reason only of the existence of any vacancy among its members or any defect in the constitution thereof.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 3 of 1974, s. 13, for "the Corporation" (w.e.f. 7-4-1975).
